razorpay_s2s_cards_error_invalid_token.message: Card token expired or invalid. Please re-enter card details.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_cvv_required.message: CVV required for this transaction. Please enter CVV.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_card_declined.message: Bank declined the transaction. Please retry or use another card.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_card_expired.message: Card has expired. Please enter valid card details.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_insufficient_fu.message: Card has insufficient balance. Please use another card or payment method.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_authentication_.message: OTP incorrect or expired. Please retry with resend if available.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_daily_limit_exc.message: Daily card limit reached. Please try again tomorrow or use another card.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_international_b.message: International transactions not allowed on this card. Please use a domestic card.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_idempotency_con.message: Idempotency-Key has already been used with a different request body.

razorpay_s2s_cards_error_rate_limit.message: Too many requests. Please retry later.
